com.societegenerale.failover.core.exception.policy.MethodExceptionPolicy

Packages that use MethodExceptionPolicy
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.exception.policy
Pluggable policies that govern what happens when a failover method throws.

  • Uses of MethodExceptionPolicy in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type MethodExceptionPolicy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MethodExceptionHandler
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.methodExceptionHandler(MethodExceptionPolicy methodExceptionPolicy)
    Registers the MethodExceptionHandler that applies the active exception policy.

  • Uses of MethodExceptionPolicy in com.societegenerale.failover.core.exception.policy

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.exception.policy that implement MethodExceptionPolicy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NeverRethrowMethodExceptionPolicy
    MethodExceptionPolicy that serves recovered data when available, and cascades the original exception only when there is nothing to recover.
    class 
    RethrowIfNoRecoveryMethodExceptionPolicy
    MethodExceptionPolicy that serves recovered data when available, and cascades the original exception only when there is nothing to recover.
